storyAwards.description: Side objective or minor NPC favor completed
Major campaign turning point (defeat BBEG phase, save city, etc.)
Solved encounter through creative thinking instead of combat
Important lore discovery, map completion, or secret found
Resolved potentially violent encounter through negotiation
XP for bypassing/disabling trap (same as defeating)

encountersPerDay.notes: Standard adventuring day assumes 4-5 medium encounters with short rests between, one long rest per day

terrainModifiers.notes: Chokepoints favor defenders, large creatures penalized
Breathing required, weapons penalized, freedom of movement valuable
Acrobatics checks, falling, cover from chimneys/walls

attitudes.name: Hostile
attitudes.description: Will actively hinder, attack, or betray the party

attitudes.name: Unfriendly
attitudes.description: Dislikes the party, unhelpful but not violent

attitudes.name: Indifferent
attitudes.description: Neutral, will help for fair price

attitudes.name: Friendly
attitudes.description: Likes the party, helpful when convenient

attitudes.name: Helpful
attitudes.description: Goes out of their way to assist

intimidateRules.effect: Shifts attitude to friendly for 1d6x10 minutes, then hostile

bluffRules.baseDC: Sense Motive check or 10 + WIS modifier + ranks

requestDCs.request: Major favor (loan money, take personal risk)

governmentTypes.name: Council
governmentTypes.description: Group of leaders ruling by consensus

qualities.name: Strategic Location
qualities.description: Key trade route or military position

archetypes.name: Dungeon Crawl
archetypes.description: Classic exploration of dangerous underground complexes
archetypes.pacingNotes: 2-3 combat encounters per dungeon level, rest opportunities between levels

archetypes.name: Wilderness Exploration
archetypes.description: Hex-crawl style exploration of untamed lands
archetypes.pacingNotes: 1-2 encounters per day of travel, discoveries every 2-3 hexes

archetypes.name: Political Intrigue
archetypes.description: Court politics, espionage, and power struggles
archetypes.pacingNotes: Social encounters are the primary challenge, combat is rare but impactful

archetypes.name: War Campaign
archetypes.description: Large-scale military conflict with strategic decisions
archetypes.pacingNotes: Alternate between strategic decisions and personal-scale missions behind enemy lines

archetypes.name: Gothic Horror
archetypes.description: Dark, atmospheric campaign with sanity-testing threats
archetypes.pacingNotes: Build tension slowly, use haunts and environmental storytelling, limit magical healing

archetypes.name: Pirate/Naval
archetypes.description: Seafaring adventures with ship combat and island exploration
archetypes.pacingNotes: Alternate between sea voyages (random encounters) and port/island exploration

archetypes.name: Urban Campaign
archetypes.description: City-based adventures with crime, mystery, and social climbing
archetypes.pacingNotes: Investigations drive the plot, combat erupts at key moments

archetypes.name: Planar Adventures
archetypes.pacingNotes: Each plane should feel distinct with unique mechanics and challenges

storyArcStructure.description: Inciting incident that draws party in
Final confrontation or major turning point
Aftermath, rewards, setup for next arc

plotTwists: Trusted ally is secretly the villain
The quest item is cursed or has unexpected powers
The villain was being manipulated by a greater threat
A party member has a hidden connection to the antagonist
The dungeon is actually a living creature
The rescued NPC is actually a doppelganger
The map leads to a completely different location
Two opposing factions were once the same organization
The prophecy was mistranslated — it refers to the villain, not the hero
The treasure is actually a prison for something terrible
An ally from a previous adventure returns as an enemy
The party's base/home is attacked while they are away
A natural disaster changes the landscape and politics
A previously defeated enemy returns stronger
The party's true threat is something they caused inadvertently
The quest-giver had their own hidden agenda all along
An important NPC is a ghost or undead the whole time
The magical artifact is sentient and manipulating events
The enemy has time-traveled from the future
The party is in an illusory or alternate reality

hooks: Noble hires party for a job
Mysterious stranger offers a quest with vague rewards
Ancient map found in old book
Teleportation mishap lands them somewhere unexpected

tactics.name: Allegory
tactics.description: Use a story/comparison to make a point

tactics.name: Red Herring
tactics.description: Divert attention from the real issue

rules.counterBonus: +2 to skill check when using a counter tactic

templates.name: Navigate Wilderness
templates.special: Each failure adds 1 day to journey

templates.name: Persuade Crowd
templates.special: Success shifts crowd attitude one step

planes.name: Material Plane
planes.description: The mortal world where most campaigns take place

planes.name: Ethereal Plane
planes.description: Misty plane overlapping the Material, accessible via etheric projection

planes.name: Astral Plane
planes.hazards: Psychic storms, color pools, thought-reactive terrain
planes.description: Silvery void connecting outer planes, access via astral projection

planes.name: Shadow Plane
planes.description: Dark mirror of the Material Plane, home to shadow creatures and evil fey

planes.name: Positive Energy Plane
planes.hazards: Overhealing (explode if HP exceeds max x2)
planes.description: Blinding plane of pure life force, can heal or burn

planes.name: Negative Energy Plane
planes.description: Void of death and entropy, spawning ground for undead

planes.name: Plane of Fire
planes.description: Endless sea of flame with rare islands of solid matter

planes.name: Plane of Water
planes.description: Infinite ocean with pockets of air, home to aquatic outsiders

planes.name: Plane of Air
planes.hazards: Falling (infinite), wind storms up to 200 mph
planes.description: Endless sky with floating islands, djinn strongholds, air elemental cities

planes.name: Plane of Earth
planes.description: Solid rock with rare cavern pockets, home to xorn and earth elementals

planes.name: Heaven (Celestia)
planes.hazards: Evil creatures take -2 on attacks/saves, painful exposure to goodness
planes.description: Lawful Good paradise of seven heavens, celestial kingdoms

planes.name: Abyss
planes.hazards: Random mutation, demonic encounters, madness, despair aura
planes.description: Infinite layers of demonic horror, home to demons and chaos

planes.name: Hell (Baator)
planes.hazards: Soul contracts, devil encounters, binding by infernal law
planes.description: Nine layers of diabolic order, ruled by archdevils with iron contracts

planes.name: Axis
planes.hazards: Rigid physics, time enforcement, law sensitivity
planes.description: Plane of absolute order and law, home to inevitable constructs

planes.name: Limbo
planes.description: Realm of pure chaos where will shapes reality, protean domain

golarionMonths.name: Abadius
golarionMonths.description: Month of beginnings, cold and harsh

golarionMonths.name: Erastus
golarionMonths.description: Month of luck, hot and bright

golarionMonths.name: Lamashan
golarionMonths.description: Month of ghosts, nights grow long

majorHolidays.name: New Year Festival
majorHolidays.description: Celebration of new beginnings and resolutions

majorHolidays.name: Founding Day
majorHolidays.description: Commemorates the founding of the nation (varies by region)

majorHolidays.name: Summer Solstice Festival
majorHolidays.description: Peak of summer, celebration of sun and growth

majorHolidays.name: Harvestide
majorHolidays.description: Multi-day celebration of harvest, thanksgiving, and gratitude

majorHolidays.name: Night of the Gray Moon
majorHolidays.description: Spooky night when veil between worlds is thin

majorHolidays.name: Winter Solstice Festival
majorHolidays.description: Longest night, festivals of light and hope

events: Snow storms and avalanche danger in mountains
Thaw and flooding in low areas
Shorter days, undead and spirits more active
Cold fronts and early snows in north

daysOfWeek.association: Sun, strength, power, rest for some

timePassageRules.shortRest: 1 hour (PF1e: ability to recover spells for some classes)
timePassageRules.longRest: 8 hours (full recovery for hit points and abilities)

moonPhases.effects: Darkness at night, undead slightly stronger (-1 save bonus)
Growing light, good time for new ventures
Brightest night, werewolves transformed, undead at peak power
Fading light, wisdom and reflection common
Half moon declining, good for endings and banishing
Faint light, dark magic more potent

trapTypes.resistanceMethod: Combination of saves and Disable Device

trapRewards.description: Basic trap, easy to find and disable
Combat encounter tied to trap mechanism

treasureByEncounter.items: 1-2 minor magic items or 1 moderate item
2-3 permanent magic items or 1 major item

shortRest.abilities: Limited ability recovery for some classes

longRest.abilities: All standard class abilities fully restored

lighteningConditions.penalty: Ranged impossible, Melee -4, Perception impossible without darkvision

coverBonuses.examples: Stone wall, thick door, solid furniture
Behind solid wall, underground, different plane
